Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel San Francisco General Hospital To Comply With Subpoena Of Records Of Pltf Ronnie E. Edwards,
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Booker Thomas' motion to compel production of records from San Francisco General Hospital is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005 requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of Pltf'S Curretn Residence
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Booker Thomas's motion to compel an inspection of plaintiff's residence is granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Carolyn Johnson Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1987.1; Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sec 2020.240 And 1992
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Booker Thomas's motion to compel the attendance of Carolyn Johnson at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to immediately contact counsel for defendant to schedule the inspection and deposition. The inspection shall be completed within seven days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2006 Set For Trial On Feb-20-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-06-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Booker Thomas' motion to quash the subpoena is granted. As drafted, the subpoena is overbroad. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to narrowing the scope of the subpoena. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
